title: The Death of Mirdis b. Amr b. Hudayr
description: Abu Ja'far al-Tabari reported: There has already been in this book an account of Abu Bilal's revolt, Ubaydallah b. Ziyid 's sending Aslam b. Zuesh al-Kilibi586 against him with two thousand men, their battle at Asak587 and the defeat of Aslam and his army by Abu Bilal and his followers.se8 According to Hisham b. Muhammad-Abu Mikhnaf-Abu al-Mukhiriq al-Rasibi: 589 When Ubaydallah b. Ziyad learned of Aslam b. Zur'ah's defeat, he sent three thousand men against Abu Bilil under the command of 'Abbad b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 19
